_comment: Default key -> UserIntent bindings for avatar + vessel control. Keys are bevy KeyCode variant names (e.g. 'KeyW', 'Space'); intents are lunco_core::UserIntent variants. A vessel maps these intents to its ports via its USD Controls profile (see assets/vessels/control_profiles.usda). Mouse Look/Zoom axes are added in code (not key-bindable). This file is the single source of the default keymap — no keys are hardcoded in Rust.
